transcript.clean_text: love welter we've had a time trial a day for the sprinters and now straight away on stage three picon blanco keeping the variation packed within this great race likewise the temperatures 24 celsius in the valleys but only 11 on the top of our final test what a test it turned out to be ramps of 18 to be contended with who would be brave enough to take it on well we had a very very strong breakaway of eight riders that decided that this day may well offer them up something special at one point every single one of these riders would have been in the virtual lead had they been alone out front primos roglic and jumbo visma not determined to chase it down they were going to be nobody's fools and nobody else it seemed were really that interested in closing the gap so it was that cepcus's king of the mountains jersey transferred at least briefly to the shoulders of tobias buyer from alps in phoenix after finishing second on the opening climb of the day he took the penultimate test to go into polka dots well going into the red most certainly were the breakaway they were testing each other out karma jam for a g tour mondial elisande was up here as well amaz ketter just starting to struggle on the the testy ramps for kaya roral but there are other names here familiar names as well like ryan taramay joe dombrovsky they'd done battle on peaks in the past taramai 34 years of age how would he cope when he reached out for glory later on meanwhile the pack was starting to close in the gap was down to just about two minutes but the pace that they were setting was starting to upset some of the pre-race favorites olympic champion richard karapas was struggling he wasn't alone his teammate adam yates thankfully for india's grenadiers looked strong but none was stronger than ryan taramay the advantage he carried to the line spectacular enough not only to win the day but also to take the lead in the race wonderful performance by him and for intimacy wanti gobert as well movie star had high hopes at the beginning of the day and as if to underscore that mass and lopez finished strongly with lander yates and of course roglic well verdi tucked in there as well but some big gaps more time lost for hugh carthy who got caught behind the crash on stage two just like adam yates time you have to find on this man later on reign tara may our new leader for how long we shall see there's some flat days to come he could be in red for quite some time tara may then takes the day ahead of dombroski kelly ellison in third place ahead of karmiyan mass lopez and roglic amongst the favorites yates lander a battle plan set out and beautifully delivered it was a knockout blow super work from ryan taramay who leads the race bernal now goes into the young riders jersey taramay also owns the polka dots after a finish from cepcus further down the order always enthralling lavuelter no climbs tomorrow we're back sprinting again but with a little sting in the tail this could be another for the breakaway but certainly you'll have to be a strong man one of the punchers towards the end ramps that will test we'll see how it pans out a fascinating race this certainly is full of surprises more to come for sure you
